title: Well-known South African actress loses cancer battle
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Michelle Botes (62) who starred in various South African television productions such as Die Swart Kat, Konings and Isidingo lost her battle with cancer this morning.


> Many will remember her for her role as the villain Cherel de Villiers in Isidingo.


In her last interview with the magazine Bruis, Botes opened up about her battle with a rare and incurable type of blood cancer for the past two years.

She lived with her son in Observatory, Cape Town at the time of her passing.

Tributes for the actress have been streaming in on social media.

Read original story on www.citizen.co.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
